name: rust-provider-protocols
title: Rust provider protocol adapters
description: Implement the five milestone-1 provider protocol adapters with deterministic local conformance fixtures.
creator: mj
notes: Planning reviewed and accepted on 2026-07-21; authorization to modify code was explicitly reconfirmed on 2026-07-22. The archived rust-foundation-contracts dependency is verified completed. The provider interface contract is frozen from TypeScript evidence: typed request options, wakeable cancellation, closed failures, structured stream termination, and provider-blocking DTO parity. Ready for task.py start immediately when the workflow enters implementation; no further user approval is required and trellis-before-dev remains mandatory.
